name: github_list_public_repos
description: List all public repositories on GitHub in creation order (GET /repositories). Pagination uses the `since` query parameter (repository id cursor), not page/per_page. The response includes `since`, `pages_fetched`, and `pagination` from the `Link` header—pass `next.since` on the next call when `pagination.next` is set. Set `all_pages` to follow `next` links up to `max_pages` (default **100**); if `truncated` is true, continue with `pagination.next.since` or increase `max_pages`.

since.description: Only return repositories with an id greater than this value. Omit for the first page.
